query_parameters.value: SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone, Name FROM Contact WHERE Email = '{{ user.email }}'

connectors.name: Salesforce Case Lookup by Contact Email

query_parameters.value: SELECT Id, CaseNumber, Subject, Status, Priority FROM Case WHERE Contact.Email = '{{ user.email }}' ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC

connectors.name: Salesforce Create Case for Contact
Salesforce Create Contact and Case
